content: Good evening, sir. It is Wednesday the 8th of July, 22:52 - a clear summer day at 19 degrees. Nvidia is up 3.7 percent. Would you care for your daily briefing, covering AI and technology news, markets, calendar, tasks and priority email?
Um Ryan , I just want you to inve sti gate I ran on the glo be , please give me the latest.
Flying you to Iran, sir, and fetching the latest regional news.
